creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
If a -lpthread option is needed not only for a static-link of sqlite but
also for the dynamic-lining that monotone uses, I guess if the more
proper solution isn't to fix sqlite's pkg-config .pc file to emit that
requirements also when used without --static option.
I opened this bug about it: http://www.sqlite.org/cvstrac/tktview?tn=3943
If anyone knows threading issues better than me and thinks I'm wrong
about it, please tell so. ;)
